query:
insert or replace into LeafRequirements (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                id
            )
            select last_collect_nr, product_id, id
            from Requirements
            where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
            and id not in (
                select parent_req_id
                from RequirementHierarchies
                where parent_product_id = $2
            )
